----------------------------------------------------------------------------
  Posix Interface to stat system call

record_types.name: Stat_Info

fields.name: Device
fields.description: Id of Device containing the file

record_types.name: Statvfs_Info

fields.name: Blocks
fields.description: File system size in fragment units (Frsize)

fields.name: Bavail
fields.description: Free blocks available to unprivileged users

fields.name: Files
fields.description: Total file nodes in file system

fields.name: Ffree
fields.description: Free file nodes in file system

fields.name: FAvail
fields.description: Free file nodes aviable to unprivileged users

fields.name: Namemax
fields.description:
Maximum filename length (note this is the max

length for each path fragment)

fields.name: Pathmax
fields.description:
Maximum relative path length

(from current directory). Strictly speaking
statvfs does not return the max path but this
value can be useful and thus added to the
original statvfs structure.

subprograms.name: Fstat
subprograms.code:
function Fstat
   (FD   : GNATCOLL.OS.FS.File_Descriptor;
    Info : in out Stat_Info)
   return Libc_Status

subprograms.name: Fstatvfs
subprograms.code:
function Fstatvfs
   (Fd : FS.File_Descriptor; Info : in out Statvfs_Info) return Libc_Status

subprograms.name: Lstat
subprograms.code: function Lstat (Path : C_String; Info : in out Stat_Info) return Libc_Status

subprograms.name: Stat
subprograms.code: function Stat (Path : C_String; Info : in out Stat_Info) return Libc_Status

subprograms.name: Statvfs
subprograms.code:
function Statvfs
   (Path : C_String; Info : in out Statvfs_Info) return Libc_Status
